name: HRM_PLAN_EXTERNAL_CANDIDATES
description: Succession External Candidates created from Succession Plans.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning.

columns.Name: EXTERNAL_CANDIDATE_ID
columns.Comments: External candidate id is primary key for the table.

columns.Name: FIRST_NAME
columns.Comments: The first name of the candidate.

columns.Name: LAST_NAME
columns.Comments: The last name of the candidate.

columns.Name: DISPLAY_NAME
columns.Comments: The display name of the candidate. This is derived from first_name last_name.

columns.Name: CURRENT_EMPLOYER_NAME
columns.Comments: Current company name of the candidate.

columns.Name: CURRENT_JOB_TITLE
columns.Comments: Current job title of the candidate.

columns.Name: ADDRESS_LINE1
columns.Comments: Address line 1 represents the first line for address description.

columns.Name: ADDRESS_LINE2
columns.Comments: The second line of the address.

columns.Name: COUNTRY
columns.Comments: Country where this address belongs.

columns.Name: STATE
columns.Comments: State represents the name of the state for address.

columns.Name: TOWN_OR_CITY
columns.Comments: Town or city represents the name of city for address.

columns.Name: POSTAL_CODE
columns.Comments: National code to identify addresses in a specific country.

columns.Name: EMAIL_ADDRESS
columns.Comments: Email address represents the E-mail address of the candidate.

columns.Name: PHONE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Phone number represents the telephone number of the candidate.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
